title: modiola lateritia
intro: Modiola lateritia, also known as rock trefoil or kidney vetch, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Modiola lateritia include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Modiola lateritia can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems.
